settings.title: Impact-Resistant Polymer
settings.text: High-strength PETG built to absorb thousands of full-force wall ball reps.

settings.title: No Rack Required
settings.text: Mounts with included hardware on any interior or exterior wall.

settings.title: Weather Resistance

settings.heading: You don't lose Hyrox on the run.You lose it on no-reps.

settings.text: Train against a taped square or a rack-mounted target at the wrong height and your depth and aim drift. Then race day comes, the judge's standard doesn't move, and every missed rep is wasted seconds you'll never claw back.

The SUB90 Wall Ball Target fixes the root cause. It bolts toany wall at true competition height, sits proud of the surface for real tactile feedback, and is sized to the standard, so the rep you drill at home is the rep that counts on the floor.

settings.caption: Mount it once
settings.heading: Any wall becomes your station
settings.text:
Studs, wood, concrete, or brick, indoor or outdoor. Set it at competition height regardless of your ceiling clearance and free up the space your rack was hogging.

Tip: mounting on drywall without studs isn't recommended. These targets take a beating.

settings.caption: Built to be abused
settings.heading: Ultra-strong PETG construction
settings.text: Engineered to withstand intense sessions and harsh weather alike. Hit it as hard as you want. It shrugs off the impact and the elements, so you replace it never, not every season.

settings.caption: Feel every rep
settings.heading: Tactile feedback, not guesswork
settings.text: It sits out from the wall so you feel the contact and know instantly when you've hit it properly. No squinting, no second-guessing, just clean confirmed reps.

settings.heading: The target is the start. Here's the rest.

settings.text: Somewhere to store the ball, grips for your hands, a way to mark the height. Grab it in one cart and save versus buying it piece by piece.
Training as a pair, or both heights?Grab the 2-packand add the height marking kit in the buy box.
Train on it for a full 30 days. If it isn't the most solid target you've hit, or anything is wrong with your order, email us and we'll make it right. Real humans, real promise.

settings.caption: From the people who make them

settings.heading: We build these by hand, and we actually use them.

settings.text: "We have a lot of fun making these targets, and we love helping people get active. Every target is designed, tested, and shipped by our small crew in Frisco, Texas, because we train on these same walls. If anything is ever wrong with your order, email me and we'll make it right. That's a promise from a human, not a help desk."

settings.heading: 90 seconds from box to first rep

settings.title: Marcus T.
settings.text: "Mounted it on my garage's exterior brick in 20 minutes. Finally training at real comp height, and my no-reps at my last Hyrox dropped to zero."

settings.heading: Can I mount it on drywall?
settings.row_content: It mounts to studs, wood, concrete, or brick, indoor or outdoor. Mounting on drywall without studs isn't recommended, because these targets are built to take heavy impact and need a solid anchor.

settings.heading: Will it survive outdoors?
settings.row_content: Yes. It's made from ultra-strong PETG that resists both intense training and harsh weather, with no rust or corrosion, indoors or out.

settings.heading: Is it true competition height?
settings.row_content: Because it's wall-mounted, you set it at competition height regardless of your ceiling clearance. It's also sized slightly smaller than the competition plate so your training reps build race-day precision.

settings.heading: How fast does it ship?
settings.row_content: Free US ground shipping on every order, shipped from Frisco, TX. Order before the daily cutoff and it ships the same business day (Mon to Fri, 9 to 5 CST).

settings.heading: What if it's not for me?
settings.row_content: You're covered by our 30-day "you chickened out" return policy. If anything is wrong with your order, we'll gladly make it right.

settings.text: Every rep should have purpose. Set the standard on your own wall and walk into race day with no doubt.
Free US shipping. 30-day returns. Built by athletes in the USA.
